author: Kuzen
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A calendar view combined with a heatmap for diary and weekly note management.

manifest.author: Kuzen
manifest.description: A calendar view combined with a heatmap for diary and weekly note management.
manifest.name: Calendar Pro

name: Calendar Pro

releases.author: kuzen-so
releases.description:
## What's New in 1.3.3

### Features
- **Today button enhancement**: Clicking the today button now returns to the current month AND opens today's diary automatically.
- **Today button stays enabled** in calendar view even when already in the current month, so you can always jump back to today.
- **Active diary highlight** is re-applied after calendar refresh, ensuring the current note stays highlighted.

### Bug Fixes
- **Show week numbers toggle** now immediately refreshes the calendar view when toggled.

### Improvements
- Settings page reordered: week-related options (week start, show week numbers, weekly folder) are now grouped together.
- TypeScript source code synced with compiled output for consistency.

### Installation
Download , , and  from this release, place them in your vault's  folder, then enable the plugin in Obsidian settings.
releases.name: Calendar Pro 1.3.3

releases.name: Calendar Pro 1.3.2

releases.author: kuzen-so
releases.description:
## Changes

- Performance optimizations: file caching for weekly notes, yearly cache for weekly count statistics
- Remove empty diary tips from heatmap and calendar views
- Dim out-of-month dots in calendar view
- Replace week-label underline hover with background highlight
- Fix TypeScript strict null checks
- Enable esbuild minify for smaller bundle size (~41% reduction)
- Sync manifest description to English
releases.name: Calendar Pro v1.3.1

releases.author: kuzen-so
releases.description:
### 安装方式

#### 方式一：BRAT（推荐）
1. 安装 [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) 插件
2. 打开命令面板 → BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing
3. 输入 `https://github.com/kuzen-so/calendar-pro`
4. 点击 Add Plugin

#### 方式二：手动安装
1. 下载本 Release 中的 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`
2. 在你的 Obsidian Vault 中创建文件夹 `.obsidian/plugins/calendar-pro/`
3. 将下载的 3 个文件放入该文件夹
4. 重启 Obsidian，在设置 → 社区插件中启用「Calendar Pro」

### 主要更新
- 代码重构：拆分 DiaryService、HeatmapRenderer、CalendarRenderer
- 热力图颜色改为 GitHub 风格绿色系，支持深浅主题
- 新增 5 档阈值设置 UI（50/150/300/500/800 字）
- 日历圆点改为阶梯式推进（达到阈值变实心，同时产生下一级空心圆点）
- 新增键盘快捷键导航（← → 切换月份/年份）
- 新增热力图图例和空状态提示
- 修复周记标记首次加载不显示、跨年份高亮失效等问题
- 切换图标从 emoji 改为 Obsidian 原生 Lucide 图标
- 插件 ID 统一为 `calendar-pro`
releases.name: Calendar Pro v1.3.0
